"  
* * *  
<<The specialist defines the graph and its adjacency matrix.>>  
<<She uses matrix exponential to model the expected number of visits.>>  
<<The matrix exponential captures the continuous-time random walk.>>  
* * *  
<<The specialist applies SVD to reduce the rank of the matrix.>>  
<<She approximates the original matrix with a lower-rank matrix.>>  
<<The Frobenius norm measures the difference between the matrices.>>  
* * *  
<<The low-rank matrix minimizes the norm.>>  
<<The SVD identifies the most significant singular values.>>  
<<The result improves storage efficiency and retrieval speed.>>
